//------------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Weight Matrix File Format (10x64, 4-bit quantized weights)
//------------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Total: 640 weights (10 rows × 64 columns), values 0–15.
//
// SECTION 1 — Binary (machine-readable)
//   Testbenches load only this block: 4-bit binary tokens inside [...] per row.
//
// SECTION 2 — Decimal (human reference)
//   Same matrix in decimal; comment-only lines (not loaded).
//------------------------------------------------------------------------------

//==============================================================================
// SECTION 1: Binary matrix (loaded by simulation)
//==============================================================================
